prompt:
[Subject] Image 1, Image 2, ratio 2:3, realistic

[Subject Pose and Expression]
A pose of relaxing while lying on a side on a classically patterned sofa. With eyes closed gently, she has a dreamy and peaceful expression. Her right hand is placed comfortably in front of her face, and with her left hand, she makes an elegant gesture of carefully picking up a small, fresh strawberry and holding it close to her face as if smelling its fragrance.

[Pose Details]
Overall posture: Side-lying / Lateral recumbent pose on a sofa
Body direction: Right side touching the sofa, 3/4 front view with the upper body slightly tilted forward

Head & Neck
Head: Resting on the sofa on the right side, face looking in the same direction.
Neck: Naturally relaxed state, cervical spine neutral position

Right Arm (arm under the face)
Shoulder: Pressed toward the floor (internal rotation)
Elbow: Bent at about 90 degrees, elbow located on the floor in front of the body
Wrist: Slightly bent so the back of the hand rests on the floor with the palm facing up, naturally placed in front of the person's face.
Fingers: Naturally slightly bent

Left Arm (arm stretched forward)
Shoulder: Forward flexion about 30~40 degrees
Elbow: Lightly bent at about 120 degrees
Wrist: Slightly rotated with the palm facing up (supination)
Fingers: Pinch grip lightly holding a strawberry with thumb, index, and middle fingers
Nails: Long, red pastel pink tone nail art, protruding about 1.5cm from the fingertips

Shoulders & Chest
Shoulder line: Right side on the floor, 90-degree vertical.
Clavicle: Left clavicle exposed and clearly visible to the camera

[Subject Clothing]
Wearing a minimal and lightweight white slip tank top dress with thin shoulder straps. The delicate shoulders and arm lines are naturally revealed, a simple costume that maximizes the overall pure yet alluring atmosphere of the character.

[Subject Hair and Makeup Details]
Voluminous and natural long brown hair flows softly on the sofa, catching the sunlight. Makeup emphasizes vitality with broad reddish blush on both cheeks, and the lips are also colored red. The nails feature flamboyant pink nail art trimmed long and pointed.

[Lighting and Light Direction]
Intense, warm afternoon direct sunlight from the upper right diagonal falls on the subject's face and hair. High-contrast lighting with clear contrast between light and shadow, where skin and hair hit by sunlight shine dazzlingly while deep shadows are cast on the opposite side.

[Texture and Color Mood]
The warm brown-toned sofa background and the intense, vivid red of the strawberries create a visual contrast. The glossy hair, soft skin texture, and the bumpy, fresh texture of the strawberries with seeds on the surface are vividly expressed, creating a seductive mood.

[Film and Camera Lens Depth, Angle]
Gives the feel of a film snapshot as if capturing an emotional and private moment. The camera must perfectly photograph the side of the face in a close-up from a 90-degree vertical top-down view, capturing only a part of the shoulder.

The position within the frame follows the X,Y axes exactly:
Tip of the nose at 286, 330.
Left shoulder at 621, 451.
Left elbow at 678, 896.
Center of the plate with strawberries at 172, 679.

Lens 50mm, aperture f/2.0, shutter speed 1/450s, ISO 100, white balance 5500K

[Background Elements (Optional)]
An antique sofa in brown tones with exquisite classical patterns. In front of the person is a clean circular white ceramic plate filled with several fresh red strawberries, with a few strawberries naturally fallen onto the sofa outside the plate to add a sense of space.

[Signature] A small Threads logo operated by Meta is located in the lower right, and above it, "CHAse" is written small like a signature in white cursive.
